summary: Addressed systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES by tightening blocking-barrier validation to evaluate every RouteCorridor/barrier reference independently. A corridor that references a BarrierChannel with traversalRule=blocks-without-explicit-corridor is now rejected unless that same corridor has a from/to StrategicNode with nodeKind pass, crossing, or port and that endpoint lists the same barrierChannelId. Added a focused negative test that mutates corridor.basin-coast-watch to reference barrier.b-ridge-spine without a valid explicit endpoint. Existing malformed-fixture negatives remain covered.

tests_run.result: Showed modified allowed implementation/test/content/project-state files and task message/route evidence files; no commit was made.

tests/content-tools-compiler.test.ts passed: 40 tests. Includes the new ordinary corridor blocking-barrier negative and existing historical-overclaim, barrier-without-crossing, governance shortcut, hidden grid/lattice/sequential-id, duplicate id, and missing endpoint tests.
All default content validation passed. M2 prototype manifestHash is 78cdb864.

tests_run.command: cmd /c pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/sim-core-boot-boundary.test.ts
tests_run.result: tests/sim-core-boot-boundary.test.ts passed: 3 tests. Deterministic boot hash updated to 11b384ec after removing an invalid blocking-barrier reference from the fixture.

decisions.decision: Changed validation from barrier-level existence of any valid crossing corridor to per RouteCorridor/barrier evaluation, so one valid crossing no longer masks another invalid corridor referencing the same blocking barrier.
Removed barrier.h-west-ridge from corridor.anchorage-east-ridge because neither endpoint is an explicit pass/crossing/port endpoint for that barrier under the tightened invariant.

Did not change historical wording, historicity labels, source assertions, culture/language labels, road/port/pass importance claims, or historical specificity. This R2 is routed directly back to systems_architect as requested.

risks.summary: Removing the invalid barrier reference changed the M2 content manifest hash and deterministic boot state hash.
risks.mitigation: Updated only the sim-core boot boundary expected hash after rerunning content validation and sim-core tests.

risks.summary: The strategicTerrain source field remains compiler-local because packages/content-schema changes were outside the accepted implementation approach for this task.
risks.mitigation: Explicit parser, compiler validation, runtime DTO compilation, and focused tests remain in allowed paths.

requested_action: Review the R2 per-corridor blocking-barrier validation fix and focused negative test. If accepted, route onward according to the M7 task reviewer sequence.
